nodes.name: Vauriella
nodes.summary: Vauriella（Vauriella）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Eyebrowed jungle flycatcher、White-browed jungle flycatcher、黑林鹟等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Eyebrowed jungle flycatcher
nodes.summary: Eyebrowed jungle flycatcher（Vauriella gularis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Eyebrowed jungle flycatcher。

nodes.name: Eyebrowed jungle flycatcher
nodes.summary: The eyebrowed jungle flycatcher (Vauriella gularis) is a species of bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the island of Borneo (elevated areas, including the Meratus Mountains). The natural habitat of the eyebrowed jungle flycatcher is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It builds an open, mossy cup nest, generally in epiphytes or spiny palms. This species was previously placed in the genus Rhinomyias but was moved to Vauriella when a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2010 found that Rhinomyias was polyphyletic. References External links Video of female feeding young
